<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>We meet again!<unk[5:0]> Look at you, working so

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Aha! You've come to this Skyview Tower

and in rainy weather on top of it!

<unk[3:0:267]>咦？<unk[5:1]>
